back_translation: In the past, God spoke to the ancestors in many time-portions and in many ways, through the prophets
But in these final times, God has spoken to us through the Son, the One whom God appointed to be heir of all things, and through the Son God created all the ages

The Son is the radiance of the glory of God, and is the exact image of the nature of Him. He upholds all things by the powerful word of Him. When He had cleansed all sins, He sat at the right side of the Majesty in the highest place
He has become greater than all the angels, as much as the name He has inherited is more excellent than theirs
Because to which of the angels did God ever say, ‘You are my Son, today I have begotten you,’ and again say, ‘I will be father to him, and he will be son to me’?
And again, when God brings the firstborn into the earth, He says, ‘All the angels of God, worship him’
And about the angels, God says, ‘He makes the angels of His to be spirits like wind, and makes the ministers of His to be flames of fire’
But about the Son, God says, ‘O God, the throne of you endures forever and ever, and the scepter of righteousness is the scepter of the kingdom of you
You loved righteousness, and hated unrighteousness. Therefore, God who is your God has anointed you with the oil of joy, above all the partners of you’
And God says again, ‘O Lord, in the beginning, you laid the foundation of the earth, and the heavens are the works of your hands
Those things will perish, but you will remain. And all things will grow old like a garment
And you will roll those things up like a robe, and they will be changed like a garment. But you yourself remain the same, and the years of you will not end’
But to which of the angels did God ever say, ‘Sit at the right side of mine, until I make the enemies of yours a footstool for the feet of yours’?
Are not all the angels ministering spirits, who are sent to serve for the sake of those who will inherit salvation?
